arts.ttl: Most valuable Champions League debutants - Florian Wirtz overtakes Bukayo Saka to set new record
arts.sum: It took Florian Wirtz just 35 minutes to make his mark in the UEFA Champions League. On Thursday evening, the Bayer Leverkusen star not only made his debut in the competition but also...

arts.ttl: Confirmed Lineups: Bayer 04 Leverkusen vs. Feyenoord Rotterdam
arts.sum: The lineups for this evening's Champions' League clash between defending German Bundesliga champions Bayer 04 Leverkusen and Feyenoord Rotterdam have been confirmed.

arts.ttl: Carro's outspoken ambition takes Leverkusen to new heights
arts.sum: When you've won three different trophies -- the Bundesliga's Meisterschale, the DFB-Pokal and the DFL-Supercup -- in the space of just a few frenetic months, why not display them from the spectacular Manhattan skyline as part of a specially arranged trophy tour in a bid to attract new fans? No one outside Leverkusen at that time knew the preparation would lead to hiring of his compatriot Xabi Alonso, but Carro and highly respected sporting CEO Simon Rolfes had crossed paths with the urbane former midfielder in the months prior.
Jamie Griffith has taken a look at the whole fixture list for week four of the Bundesliga season and selected a score prediction for each game.

arts.ttl: Predicted Bayer Leverkusen XI vs Feyenoord: Die Werkself return to Champions League action
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen return to the Champions League for the first time since the 2022/23 season when they face Feyenoord at De Kuip this evening. Xabi Alonso’s side come into this…

arts.ttl: Frimpong on facing Feyenoord: "We're not the favorites"
arts.sum: Jeremie Frimpong doesn't see Bayer Leverkusen as favorites when they face Feyenoord.

arts.ttl: Feyenoord vs. Bayer Leverkusen: UEFA Champions League team news, match stats & LIVE blog!
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen will start off their 2024/25 UEFA Champions League campaign away against Feyenoord at De Kuip on Thursday (kick-off: 6.45pm CEST). Alonso's team scored 31 goals in 13 games in the Europa League last season - the highest tally of any club side in European competition in 2023/24 (excluding qualifying matches).

arts.ttl: Feyenoord vs Bayer Leverkusen: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Feyenoord face Bayer Leverkusen for the first time since 1987 on Matchday 1 of the all-new Champions League league phase. Priske's start to life in Rotterdam has been frustrating, with Feyenoord already nine points adrift of Eredivisie holders and current leaders PSV following a string of draws at the start of the new season.

Previously, Juan Carlos Osorio, coach of Tijuana, confirmed Feyenoord's interest in Mora, who according to reports from Mexico was supposed to train with them in Rotterdam. Feyenoord are getting competition in the battle for Gilberto Mora from Club Tijuana .

arts.ttl: Real Madrid the current favourites to land Bayer Leverkusen’s Florian Wirtz next summer
arts.sum: Sport Bild reports that Bayer Leverkusen’s Florian Wirtz is looking to take the next step in his career in the summer and Real Madrid are leading the way to land his…
